name: libgeronimo-interceptor-3.0-spec-java
title: libgeronimo-interceptor-3.0-spec-java
summary: Geronimo API implementation of the Interceptor 3.0 spec
description:
Geronimo API implementation of the Interceptor 3.0 spec
Apache Geronimo is an open source application server developed by the Apache
Software Foundation.
.
The goal of the Geronimo project is to produce a server runtime framework
that pulls together the best Open Source alternatives to create runtimes
that meet the needs of developers and system administrators. Its most
popular distribution is a fully certified Java Enterprise Edition 5.0
(Java EE 5) application server runtime.
.
This package provides the Geronimo API implementation of the Interceptor
3.0 spec (javax.interceptor classes).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgeronimo-interceptor-3.0-spec-java because Geronimo API implementation of the Interceptor 3.0 spec.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgeronimo-interceptor-3.0-spec-java as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgeronimo-interceptor-3.0-spec-java with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgeronimo-interceptor-3.0-spec-java --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
